citation_and_locator: Hsu, Yu-Yin and Anqi Xu. 2020. Wh-indeterminates and Prosody in Hong Kong Cantonese. Proceedings of Speech Prosody 2020:376-380. DOI 10.21437/SpeechProsody.2020-77; official ISCA PDF and PolyU handle 10397/97890
what_it_supports: Direct interrogative/indefinite ambiguity of `mat1je5`; reduced indefinite forms; matched wh-question, yes/no-question, and statement conditions; wh-region and sentence-final-particle prosodic/duration results.
limit: Production experiment does not establish a complete wh lexicon, NPI/free-choice syntax, natural frequency, perception, or all regional varieties.

citation_and_locator: Zheng, Zhang and Gao. 2021. Hong Kong Cantonese course. User PDF pp.155 and 296; `是但邊個都得`, `是但幾時去都得`, `隨便去邊度都得`
